title: Xtra Spicy Irish Bacon Hash
description: A crumbly, spicy, and savory Irish dish featuring Castelvetrano olives and low-sodium-friendly ingredients to cure hangover symptoms.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and set them aside in a bowl.
Dice the onion and bell pepper, and set them aside in another bowl.
Cut the Irish bacon into small pieces and cook them in a pan over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the cooked bacon from the pan and set it aside.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the same pan and cook until softened.
Add the grated potatoes, flour, egg, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pan and mix well.
Return the cooked bacon to the pan and stir to combine.
Using a spatula, break up any large clumps of the potato mixture and press it down into the pan to form a thick layer.
Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
Using a spatula, break up any large clumps of the potato mixture and press it down into the pan to form a thick layer.
Serve the Xtra Spicy Irish Bacon Hash hot, garnished with Castelvetrano olives and additional ingredients of your choice.
